title: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say
summary_full: A senior officer in the Hamas-run police force was among those killed in the strike, which Israel's military says targeted "terrorists".
summary_public: A senior officer in the Hamas-run police force was among those killed in the strike, which Israel's military says targeted "terrorists".
